body.prompt: An extreme close-up, macro photograph of a golden, crispy 薯片 potato chip being snapped in half against a clean, bright background. The image is captured in ultra-slow motion, with tiny, delicious-looking crumbs frozen in mid-air. The lighting is sharp and dramatic, highlighting the delicate, crystalline texture of the salt and the chip's thin, brittle structure. The focus is razor-sharp on the breaking edge, conveying the ultimate sense of crispiness and satisfaction. The color palette is dominated by warm, golden yellows.
